title: 151 Pcs Floral Paper Party Plates Set (Set of 30), Afternoon Tea Decorations, Party Plates Cups and Napkins, BirthdayParty Decorations, Engagement Paper Plates for Parties
features: 30 Person Paper Party Plates Set: This colorful party set includes: 30 x 9 in dinner plates + 30 x 7 in dessert plates + 30 x 9 oz paper cups + 30 napkin pads + 1 x tablecloth. Enough for different and unique parties

High-quality materials: Party plates cups and napkins are all made of food-grade, high-quality materials, safe and friendly to both children and adults. Warm Tips: Please do not heat the plates and cups in the microwave
Durable and Practical: These party plates products are sturdy enough to hold food and drinks safely, while you can enjoy the decorative and elegant touch they add to your event
Suitable for Any Occasion: Perfect for weddings, birthday party decorations, engagement party decorations, family gatherings, various festivals and other occasions
Convenient and Easy to Use: After the party, just throw paper plates and napkins into the trash can. Save time on cleaning up, and you will have more time to enjoy the party

specifications_table.Occasion: Anniversary, Bachelor Party, Birthday, Christmas, Wedding
